101a4ed8-f7a0-4fe0-b6d7-ef80b2145c61.description:
We are HOGWARTS
For the best Harry Potter and Hogwarts Role Play or just fun chat we are what you are looking for!

We currently have:

Full Working Sorting Hat to join the House of your choice or the Hat will sort you!

Full Working WAND Builder to pick the Wood, Core and Size of the want you want.

Pick your own Pet to have at the school.

Learn a Patronus from Professor Lupin or from Harry Potter himself.

You can Create a Private Room in the Room of Requirements that only you and closest friends can use.

We have a fully working Trunk to keep all you kit in and see all your stats and the stats from your House.

We are always adding more fun all the time.

And Lots of games for all! 

We are LGBT+ friendly!
